roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:TRANSPORTATION ORDER/X:PURSUANT TO LPS CONSERVATORSHIP, THE COURT ORDERS DARRELL ANTHONY WASHINGTON RELEASABLE TO THE DEPARTMENT OF DISABILITY AND AGING SERVICES JAIL HEALTH REENTRY SERVICES FOR PLACEMENT AT A FACILITYMATCHING THE LEVEL OF CAREAGREED UPON BY JAIL HEALTH REENTRY SERVICES, TRANSITIONS AND THE DEPARTMENTOF DISABILITY AND AGING SERVICES, TRANSPORTATIONWILL BE ARRANGED BY EITHERTHE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DISABILITY AND AGING SERVICES, JAIL HEALTH REENTRY SERVICES WILL NOTIFY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT WHEN A BED IS AVAILBLE,/X:THE 02-03-21 STATUS OF CONSERVATORSHIP DATE IS CONFIRMED,/MENTALHEALTH/DEPT 15:02-03-21/
